programme.title: Interview With a Killer
programme.desc: In his first ever television interview, killer Thomas Gilbert, Jr. discusses the murder that shook New York's elite. The Princeton-educated Gilbert became a tabloid obsession when he shot his father after his $1,000 allowance was cut off. But in this unique installment of Interview With a Killer, Gilbert appears to be a far cry from his once golden upbringing. Host David Scott explores his long history of mental illness and the privileged pressure cooker that shaped his downfall.

Set in the near future, the stories revolve around the evil corporation, 4Ever Innovations, whose young and brilliant scientists download and sell memories. They replace those we've lost with clones and devise technology that helps us live out our greatest fantasies; from saving a failed relationship, to creating the perfect lover, to being irresistible to the opposite sex - but sometimes our deepest desires come at a terrible price. 4Ever offers customers the opportunity to live out their fantasies in a virtual world but there are secrets within 4Ever Innovations that may cost you your life.

What can be done with them? A team of Canadians has developed an innovative solution…they clean the ships...then sink them!

programme.title: Aftermath
programme.desc: Competitors Stephen and Danny sit down to recap the best and worst moments so far in the season. Also, Chris and Cindy sit down with Compliant Technologies’ founder to get the backstory on how the innovative product that is sweeping the nation (and terrorizing the contestants) came to be. Then Dr. West drops some truth bombs on the state of the average human body’s blood.

programme.title: All Stars
programme.desc: In the season finale of All Stars 3, the contestants’ hard work throughout the competition is put to the ultimate test. With tensions in the Middle East reaching a boiling point, the CIA assigns the All-Stars an executive protection mission for a key negotiator. However, before the team can deploy, escalating terrorist activity dramatically raises the threat level. Facing a surge of hostile forces, the All-Stars must come together to secure their principal and ensure their safety at all costs. When they're caught on the X with no clear way out, there's only one option left—eliminate the threat. Who will survive the mission? And who will emerge victorious?

programme.title: Wild Shots
programme.desc: This episode of Wildshots kicks off in South Carolina, where Tim Harmsen goes behind the scenes at Jacob Grey Firearms for an inside look at precision craftsmanship in action. Known for their stunning 2011 pistols—true works of art—Jacob Grey takes perfection to the micron. From raw metal to “The Hex,” Tim witnesses how engineering meets artistry to create one of America’s most elite handguns.

programme.title: Wild Shots
programme.desc: Tim heads to the Smoky Mountains for an action-packed adventure that’s as sharp as it gets. The journey kicks off at the world-famous Smoky Mountain Knife Works, the largest knife store on the planet, where Tim explores the artistry and precision behind the blades of We Knife. There, he reconnects with shooting legend Kyle Lamb, who shares his thoughts on the craftsmanship that keeps professionals equipped for anything. The action continues at Buds Gun Shop, where Tim joins Kyle once again to complete two of Lamb’s signature courses—the intense “Chaos Drill” and the dynamic “Triple Threat.” Together, they test speed, accuracy, and the mental discipline needed to master the range. But the day wouldn’t be complete without a little backwoods ingenuity. IraqVeteran8888 joins Tim for a bit of unconventional fun—combining creativity, curiosity, and some good old Redneck Science to wrap up an unforgettable episode.

programme.title: All Stars
programme.desc: It’s a new day, which means Don takes the contestants' training to new heights..literally. But first, the All-Stars are split into teams for a searching mission, using Offgrid’s Faraday bags. Later, they’re introduced to the new ropes course, “The Odyssey”, to test their mental and physical fortitude, as well as their endurance, using a climbing wall. See who rises to the occasion and who suffers from "paralysis by over analysis” in this episode.

programme.title: S2E2 Adventure Series
programme.desc: Motorbikes, speed, and pure adrenaline—this is the ultimate GoPro adventure. Ride with Mexican enduro master Didier Goirand, push limits alongside British racing icon Maria Costello, the only female motorcycle racer ever to be awarded an MBE, and feel the thrill with American motorsports legend and DC Shoes founder Ken Block. High-octane action, world-class talent, and breathtaking moments—you won’t want to miss a second.

programme.title: S1E1 NHL After Dark
programme.desc: In this episode, NHL and GoPro team up to show the game from the perspective of some of hockey’s greatest players. On NHL After Dark, Detroit Red Wings forward Tomáš Tatar puts his street hockey skills to the test with challenging stickhandling drills. Pittsburgh Penguins center Evgeni Malkin, three-time Stanley Cup champion and 2012 Hart Memorial Trophy winner, showcases his smooth hands and technical mastery as he takes on drills that look simple but are far from easy. Chicago Blackhawks defender Duncan Keith elevates target practice to an art form while outmaneuvering his opponents with precision and speed.

programme.title: S1E2 NHL After Dark
programme.desc: In this episode, NHL and GoPro join forces to capture the game through the eyes of hockey’s best players. Vancouver Canucks duo Daniel and Henrik Sedin showcase their legendary on-ice chemistry through a series of unconventional drills. Philadelphia Flyers center Claude Giroux returns for his second episode, using lightning-fast hands and impressive physicality to outmaneuver his opponents. Colorado Avalanche forward Gabriel Landeskog powers through defenders and scores hard-hitting goals that put our cameras to the ultimate test. New Jersey Devils goalie Cory Schneider takes on unique drills that double the challenge and push his skills to the limit.

programme.title: S1E1 Tour
programme.desc: Pursuing the Tour de France, one of the most physically demanding sporting events in the world, covers over 3,535 kilometers in just three weeks. Every young cyclist dreams of competing in this prestigious race, but only nine riders from each team make the cut. Young cyclist Adam Yates is giving everything he has to prove he belongs on cycling’s biggest stage. 2016 Tour de France winner Chris Froome reflects on the long and grueling journey to victory, while former professional cyclists and Tour de France veterans Jens Voigt, Christian Vande Velde, and Haimar Zubeldia reveal what it truly takes to compete at the highest level.

programme.title: Hometown Tragedy: The Pike County Massacre
programme.desc: After eight members of one family were killed in their homes in a single night, residents of the devastated Ohio community were left to wonder if they were next.

programme.title: Ed and Day in the ‘Burgh: Making Moves in McKees Rocks
programme.desc: In McKees Rocks, Ed and Day examine the power of community service. The guys experience what it’s like to be a volunteer firefighter, bread maker, and full-service entertainer.

programme.title: Finding Adventure: Hearing Impaired and Unstoppable
programme.desc: At only 21 years old, Isabelle Sander has overcome a lot in her young life with hearing loss. However, to prove to herself and others that a diagnosis doesn't define a person, she is on a mission to participate in nature and be active outdoors.

programme.title: Hit Me With Your Best Spot: Acclaimed Screenwriter, Fashion MC, & Hip Influencer Dole Out Top Hot Spots
programme.desc: Why is Kansas City's fashion scene thriving? Craving a horchata latte? Best pizza on planet Earth? Local experts Jordan Gallant, Jasmine Green, and Aaron Rahsaan Thomas have all the answers, including where to go for a new hairstyle and a pep talk.

programme.title: Blind Kitchen: Et Tu, Chicken Liver?
programme.desc: Years ago Chef Bergen Carmen from Meril and Chef Aaron Villeda from Bao Mi worked side-by-side; now they’re back getting their hands dirty for some friendly competition. Will his old pal chicken liver turn out to be Chef Villeda’s ultimate downfall?
